message:
refactor: remove unused imports from plan and trace modules

Clean up unused imports identified by the compiler:

fixtures.rs:
- Remove unused `PlanId` import from super module

certificate.rs:
- Remove unused `TraceData` import from trace::event
- Remove unused `HashMap` import from std::collections

These imports were likely left over from earlier iterations of the code.
Removing them eliminates compiler warnings and improves code clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
